cwes.desc: The product constructs all or part of an OS command using externally-influenced input from an upstream component, but it does not neutralize or incorrectly neutralizes special elements that could modify the intended OS command when it is sent to a downstream component.

The product does not use or incorrectly uses a protection mechanism that provides sufficient defense against directed attacks against the product (missing security headers such as X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Content-Security-Policy).
